A daemon is a [[Servitors|Servitor]] which performs a simple constant background task in a [[Sapients|Sapient]]. 

While they can do anything, the main usage of daemons is "indwelling the sage" or [[daemonurgy]] which is the [[vaccine]] to [[angst]], and is seen as a method of [[desire synthesis]].
[[Category:Angst]]
[[Category:Servitors]]
[[sn:Daemon]][[Category:Desire synthesis]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Daemon]][[Category:Inner Dialogue]]
[[sn:Daemon]]A daemon is a constantly running [[Servitors|Servitor]] which fulfills a background function in a [[sapient]]

[[Category:Servitors]]
[[sn:Daemon]][[Category:Angst]]
[[Category:Inner Dialogue]]
[[sn:Daemon]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Daemon]][[sn:Daemon]]
[[Category:Pages]]
